inputs.label: Microseconds
inputs.businessContext: Time duration in microseconds to be converted to nanoseconds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time duration in microseconds to be converted to nanoseconds.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from microseconds to nanoseconds. Fixed at 1000 for certified calculations. Do not alter without recalibration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from microseconds to nanoseconds. Fixed at 1000 for certified calculations. Do not alter without recalibration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mikrosaniyeden nanosaniyeye standart dönüşüm faktörü. Sertifikalı hesaplamalar için 1000 olarak sabittir. Yeniden kalibrasyon olmadan değiştirmeyin.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result. Use 0 for integer nanoseconds as per standard.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the result. Use 0 for integer nanoseconds as per standard.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucun yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı. Standarda göre tam nanosaniye için 0 kullanın.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: If converting multiple identical durations, enter the quantity. Acts as a multiplier.

businessContext_i18n.en: If converting multiple identical durations, enter the quantity. Acts as a multiplier.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birden fazla aynı süre dönüştürülüyorsa, miktarı girin. Çarpan görevi görür.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable deviation in nanoseconds for quality assurance. The result will be checked against ± tolerance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable deviation in nanoseconds for quality assurance. The result will be checked against ± tolerance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite güvencesi için nanosaniye cinsinden kabul edilebilir sapma. Sonuç ± toleransa göre kontrol edilecektir.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Instrument calibration offset added to the converted value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Instrument calibration offset added to the converted value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülen değere eklenen enstrüman kalibrasyon ofseti.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
